0.content:
# 🤖 IA For Devs × Dynatrace — GitHub Copilot Chat Observability

**Observabilidade em tempo real** do Copilot Chat nas IDEs dos devs, via OpenTelemetry nativo do VS Code.

**Filtro global aplicado:** `gen_ai.provider.name == "github"` — captura Copilot Chat + Copilot CLI + Claude Agent quando presentes.

---

11.title: Chats totais
11.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| summarize chats = count()

12.title: Sessões (invoke_agent)
12.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "invoke_agent"
| summarize sessions = count()

13.title: Devs ativos
13.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter isNotNull(user.name) or isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize devs = countDistinct(coalesce(user.email, user.name))

14.title: Tool calls
14.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "execute_tool"
| summarize tools = count()

20.content:
## 💰 FinOps — Custo e tokens

> Custo é **estimado** via pricing hardcoded na DQL. Ajustar valores conforme contrato Copilot Business/Enterprise.

21.title: Custo estimado (USD)
21.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| fieldsAdd inp = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd out = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd =
    if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "mini"),
       (inp * 0.00000015) + (out * 0.0000006),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "gpt-4o"),
       (inp * 0.0000025) + (out * 0.00001),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "claude"),
       (inp * 0.000003) + (out * 0.000015),
       (inp * 0.000002) + (out * 0.00001))))
| summarize total = sum(cost_usd)

22.title: Tokens totais
22.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| summarize tokens = sum(toLong(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) + toLong(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens))

23.title: 💰 Custo por modelo
23.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| fieldsAdd inp = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd out = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd =
    if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "mini"),
       (inp * 0.00000015) + (out * 0.0000006),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "gpt-4o"),
       (inp * 0.0000025) + (out * 0.00001),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "claude"),
       (inp * 0.000003) + (out * 0.000015),
       (inp * 0.000002) + (out * 0.00001))))
| summarize cost = sum(cost_usd),
            input_tokens = sum(inp),
            output_tokens = sum(out),
            chats = count()
  by gen_ai.request.model
| sort cost desc

24.title: 💰 Custo por dev (top 20)
24.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| filter isNotNull(user.email) or isNotNull(user.name)
| fieldsAdd inp = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd out = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd =
    if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "mini"),
       (inp * 0.00000015) + (out * 0.0000006),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "gpt-4o"),
       (inp * 0.0000025) + (out * 0.00001),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "claude"),
       (inp * 0.000003) + (out * 0.000015),
       (inp * 0.000002) + (out * 0.00001))))
| summarize cost = sum(cost_usd),
            chats = count(),
            tokens = sum(inp + out),
            modelos = countDistinct(gen_ai.request.model)
  by dev = coalesce(user.email, user.name), user.team
| sort cost desc
| limit 20

25.title: 💰 Custo por time
25.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| filter isNotNull(user.team)
| fieldsAdd inp = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd out = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd =
    if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "mini"),
       (inp * 0.00000015) + (out * 0.0000006),
    else: (inp * 0.0000025) + (out * 0.00001))
| summarize cost = sum(cost_usd),
            devs = countDistinct(coalesce(user.email, user.name)),
            chats = count()
  by user.team
| sort cost desc

31.title: ⏱️ Latência por modelo (ms)
31.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| fieldsAdd dur_ms = duration / 1000000
| summarize p50 = percentile(dur_ms, 50),
            p95 = percentile(dur_ms, 95),
            p99 = percentile(dur_ms, 99),
            requests = count()
  by gen_ai.request.model
| sort p95 desc

32.title: ❌ Taxa de erro por modelo
32.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| summarize total = count(),
            errors = countIf(status == "ERROR")
  by gen_ai.request.model
| fieldsAdd error_rate = round(toDouble(errors) / toDouble(total) * 100, 2)
| sort error_rate desc

33.title: 📈 Chats ao longo do tempo por modelo
33.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| makeTimeseries chats = count(), by:{gen_ai.request.model}, interval:5m

41.title: 🧠 Modelos mais usados
41.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| summarize chats = count(),
            devs = countDistinct(coalesce(user.email, user.name)),
            tokens = sum(toLong(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) + toLong(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens))
  by gen_ai.request.model
| sort chats desc

42.title: 🔧 Ferramentas mais invocadas (top 15)
42.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "execute_tool"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.tool.name)
| fieldsAdd dur_ms = duration / 1000000
| summarize calls = count(),
            avg_ms = avg(dur_ms),
            errors = countIf(status == "ERROR")
  by gen_ai.tool.name
| sort calls desc
| limit 15

43.title: 🏆 Top 10 devs por chats
43.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter span.name == "chat"
| filter isNotNull(user.name) or isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize chats = count(),
            tokens = sum(toLong(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) + toLong(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)),
            modelos = collectDistinct(gen_ai.request.model)
  by dev = coalesce(user.email, user.name), user.team
| sort chats desc
| limit 10

44.title: 📁 Repositórios mais trabalhados
44.query:
fetch spans
| filter gen_ai.provider.name == "github"
| filter isNotNull(github.copilot.git.repository)
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(gen_ai.conversation.id),
            devs = countDistinct(coalesce(user.email, user.name)),
            chats = countIf(span.name == "chat")
  by github.copilot.git.repository
| sort chats desc
| limit 15

50.content:
## 🧪 Evaluations — qualidade das respostas (dt-evals)

> Requer [`dt-evals`](https://github.com/dynatrace-oss/dt-evals) rodando (manual, agendado ou deploy). Ver [docs/07-evaluations.md](../docs/07-evaluations.md).

51.title: ✅ Pass rate por métrica (24h)
51.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "gen_ai.evaluation.result"
| summarize evaluations = count(),
            pass_rate = countIf(gen_ai.evaluation.score.label == "pass") * 100.0 / count(),
            avg_score = avg(gen_ai.evaluation.score.value)
  by gen_ai.evaluation.name
| sort pass_rate asc

52.title: 🔍 Score médio ao longo do tempo, por métrica

53.title: 🏃 Runs recentes
53.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "gen_ai.evaluation.result"
| summarize evaluations = count(),
            avg_score = avg(gen_ai.evaluation.score.value),
            fails = countIf(gen_ai.evaluation.score.label == "fail")
  by dt.eval.run_id, gen_ai.request.model, gen_ai.provider.name
| sort evaluations desc
| limit 15

99.content:
---

### 📖 Como esses dados chegam aqui

1. **VS Code Copilot Chat** emite OTel spans (`invoke_agent`, `chat`, `execute_tool`)
2. Spans são enviados via OTLP HTTP para um **OTel Collector corporativo**
3. Collector adiciona autenticação e forwarda para o **Dynatrace**
4. Este dashboard consulta via DQL
5. (Opcional) **dt-evals** lê os spans, roda um LLM judge e grava scores como bizevents

**Filtro principal:** `gen_ai.provider.name == "github"` + span name específico

Documentação: [Monitor agent usage with OpenTelemetry (VS Code Docs)](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/agents/guides/monitoring-agents) · [Manage AI settings in enterprise (VS Code Docs)](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/agents/reference/ai-settings) · [dt-evals (GitHub)](https://github.com/dynatrace-oss/dt-evals)
